task: Reinstate the home-page Sass-driven grid output, add explicit GOV.UK Frontend chrome to every registered service page, and fix Cloudflare Pages preview asset 404s.
userConstraintsApplied: Treat src/styles/researchops-home.scss as the source of truth for home-page grid styling.
Do not make /components/layout.js inject generated GOV.UK Frontend stylesheets into every page.
Do not use the shared header partial as a global stylesheet injection point.
Migrate service pages explicitly using the page-level GOV.UK Frontend pattern.
implementationDecisions: Kept src/styles/researchops-home.scss as the source of truth for the 8-step grid and 3-column next-actions layout.
Added generated CSS assertions for minmax grid output and the mid-grey vertical rule.
Ensured Release Gate runs npm run build before unit tests.
Added a build-time service-page normaliser based on visual-walkthrough.config.mjs.
Used npm postbuild:govuk-pages so normalisation runs after build:govuk-pages without changing the asserted build command string.
Removed hardcoded GOV.UK header/footer fallbacks during normalisation.
Added a service-wide route-state test for explicit GOV.UK Frontend chrome.
Migrated public/pages/projects/index.html to the explicit GOV.UK Frontend page pattern.
Fixed Projects acceptance parsing so govuk-body-l and govuk-body are distinct class tokens.
Added a top-level assets/researchops/researchops-home.css compatibility copy for the Cloudflare Pages preview URL observed in the browser network panel.
Added Cloudflare Pages rewrites from /assets/fonts/* and /assets/images/govuk-crest.svg to the committed GOV.UK asset directory under /assets/govuk/assets/.
Set $govuk-assets-path in src/styles/govuk.scss so future compiled GOV.UK CSS points at the deployed GOV.UK asset directory.
Added tests/deploy-asset-paths.test.js to guard preview-facing asset paths and redirect mappings.
Updated .prettierignore so the generated top-level ResearchOps CSS compatibility copy is not reformatted.

previewIssueAddressed.homeCss404: /assets/researchops/researchops-home.css was returning 404 in the browser network panel, so a top-level compatibility copy was added and guarded by tests.
previewIssueAddressed.govukAsset404s: The compiled GOV.UK CSS requested /assets/fonts/* and /assets/images/govuk-crest.svg. Cloudflare Pages rewrites now map those paths to /assets/govuk/assets/.
previewIssueAddressed.futureBuildPath: $govuk-assets-path is set in the GOV.UK Sass entry point so future compiled CSS points at the deployed GOV.UK asset directory.

validatedGreen.head: 0200d846aeec40df4dd580b2f5bbea33f461e7ef
workflows: Build and deploy agent documentation Pages

residualRisk: The build-time normaliser covers every page registered in visual-walkthrough.config.mjs. Additional public HTML files outside that registry are outside this unit. A final visual check should still be done in the Cloudflare Pages preview after the latest branch deployment completes.
